title: release date for the American volume 11 Evangelion Manga
display_title: release date for the American volume 11 Evangelion Manga
wikitext:
[]: release date for the American volume 11 Evangelion Manga?             Quote Post by crimson » Tue May 20, 2008 10:58 pm Does anyone know if there is a definitive release date for the eleventh volume of the English Evangelion Manga? It has been altogether too long for me since the last volume's release. Sorry if this question has been asked already, I attempted to search the site and got impatient so I joined for the purpose of asking this question. By the way, I've visited eva monkey in the past and eventhough I was never a member the site was always informative and helpful to a silent visitor like myself. It has been quite a while since I've been to another Eva site and this one seems to run with the same wisdom and integrity of the first. Again sorry if this question has been aksed and thanks for the help.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue May 20, 2008 11:02 pm I want to say November 3rd. I have it on preorder from Amazon.com

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue May 20, 2008 11:03 pm (Now enforcing my green, freelance mod text) Thread belongs in the "Everything Else Evangelion" Subforum. Thank you.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue May 20, 2008 11:06 pm He is right, this is for news such as the 1.01 release date on the homepage. But yea, go to amazon and preorder it. And welcome to the forums!

[]:             Quote Post by crimson » Tue May 20, 2008 11:14 pm Sorry, as you can see this is my first time posting. I wasn't exactly sure where to post this question, thanks a lot for the feedback, I'm crossing my fingers for November 3rd.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu Jun 05, 2008 10:00 am Sorry to bump this again but the date is November 11th .
